title: NHB is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: NHB is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
NHB, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Property Advisor for our Lucknow operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About NHB:
NHB is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NHB!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
